ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travels" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel event */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of the travel */,
  "travel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of travel (e.g., Flight, Train) */,
  "trip_length_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in days */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for travel */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the traveler belongs to */,
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traveler */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the travel */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the travel was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the travel (e.g., Pending, Approved, Completed) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the travel */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the travel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trip */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the travel */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the travel */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the travel request */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the travel request was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the travel request */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the travel request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travels_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES approvers ("approver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travels_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travels_traveler_id FOREIGN KEY ("traveler_id") REFERENCES travelers ("traveler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travels_travel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_type_id") REFERENCES travel_types ("travel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travels_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_types" (
  "travel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel type */,
  "travel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel type (e.g., Flight, Train) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel type */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Average cost per unit of travel */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the travel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason for travel (e.g., Meeting, Portfolio Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the travel reason */,
  "approval_required" TEXT /* Indicates whether approval is required for the travel reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department for travel */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Total budget spent by the department on travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travelers" (
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traveler */,
  "traveler_name" TEXT /* Full name of the traveler */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the traveler */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the traveler belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the traveler (e.g., Elected Member, Staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the traveler */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the traveler within the department */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the traveler (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traveler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvers" (
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approver */,
  "approver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the approver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the approver */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the approver belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the approver (e.g., Manager, Director) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the approver */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the approver within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel event the expense is associated with */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of expense (e.g., Accommodation, Meals) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "reimbursed" TEXT /* Indicates whether the expense has been reimbursed */,
  "reimbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense was reimbursed */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_expenses_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travels ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type (e.g., Accommodation, Meals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "reimbursement_policy" TEXT /* Reimbursement policy for the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel event the document is associated with */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document (e.g., Itinerary, Receipt) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_documents_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travels ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Itinerary, Receipt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "required" TEXT /* Indicates whether the document is required for the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel event the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the travel on government operations or public service delivery */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact */,
  "measurable_outcome" TEXT /* Measurable outcome of the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_outcomes_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travels ("travel_id")
)
